# Agents for this workspace

This repository includes a small custom agent description for the static task manager. See `.github/agents/` for agent definitions.

## Index

- `task-manager-agent` — Guided edits for the Task Manager app ([.github/agents/task-manager.agent.md](.github/agents/task-manager.agent.md))
- `reviewer-agent` — UI, accessibility and small JS/CSS review assistant ([.github/agents/reviewer.agent.md](.github/agents/reviewer.agent.md))
